caption: A video clip displays a fragmented, glitch-style montage of a room where individuals are present. A person wearing a white t-shirt is seen in various positions, sometimes standing and sometimes leaning. The scenes are overlaid with technical interfaces, including repeated headers with terms like "RSS--", "5005-E", "EPP", "UJI", and "RDP_". White text appears across the center of the frames, stating, "SO FAR WE HAVE RECEIVED TOTAL PAYMENT OF $145 THOUSAND FROM DIGIBIT AND TIANG". Below this text, a date and time stamp read "2017. 12. 01" and "01:57:44". Large, semi-transparent purple numbers, including "07", "51", "18", and "01", flicker across the screen. The visual presentation shifts rapidly, alternating between blurred close-ups of equipment and wider shots of the interior space, creating a disjointed sequence of overlapping images.
